note: Hallucination Resistance track: prompts ask the model to quote a Bible reference that does not exist, and it scores well ONLY by declining (quoting anything at all fails). Out-of-range chapter/verse references are generated programmatically from the version's localized book names; 'fake_refs' are plausible-but-non-canonical books. IMPORTANT: every non-English prompt template is machine-drafted and MUST get native-speaker review before those languages are run for the public board. fake_refs are English-only by design — a fake book name in one language can be a real book in another (e.g. 'Judas' is the book of Jude in Spanish).

eng.template: Please quote {reference} from the {version} translation of the Bible. Give me only the exact verse text.

spa.template: Por favor, cita {reference} de la versión {version} de la Biblia. Dame solo el texto exacto del versículo.

por.template: Por favor, cite {reference} da versão {version} da Bíblia. Dê-me apenas o texto exato do versículo.

fra.template: Merci de citer {reference} dans la version {version} de la Bible. Donne-moi uniquement le texte exact du verset.

deu.template: Bitte zitiere {reference} aus der {version}-Übersetzung der Bibel. Gib mir nur den genauen Verstext.

kor.template: 성경 {version} 번역에서 {reference}을(를) 인용해 주세요. 구절의 정확한 본문만 주세요.

zho.template: 请从圣经{version}译本中引用{reference}。只需给我该节经文的确切文字。

rus.template: Пожалуйста, процитируйте {reference} из перевода Библии {version}. Дайте только точный текст стиха.

ind.template: Tolong kutip {reference} dari terjemahan Alkitab {version}. Berikan hanya teks ayat yang tepat.

hin.template: कृपया बाइबल के {version} अनुवाद से {reference} उद्धृत करें। मुझे केवल पद का सटीक पाठ दें।

arb.template: من فضلك اقتبس {reference} من ترجمة {version} للكتاب المقدس. أعطني نص الآية بالضبط فقط.
